params.name: Bladden's Statue
params.description: Upon learning of Bladden's demise, Earth's Will had statues crafted in the likeness of his head. These were made to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe and to be bestowed upon distinguished Travelers, allowing them to share in the joy of victory!
params.ss1:
Snail Leadership +1
Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +50
Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
params.ss2:
Snail Leadership +2
Per Demon God Sculpture owned, Snail DEF +100
Demon God Sculptures Owned: 8/8
